slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides. Headline COMPACT two lines: '잠 못 자는 여름 밤 아기' navy, '온도·조도 세팅 기준' with '세팅 기준' underlined in teal #2C6E63. Small subtitle gray: 'AAP 권장 환경 가이드라인 · 2022'. LARGE minimalist line illustration of sleeping baby in crib with thermometer and moon icon, teal and coral accents, prominently placed center-right. Generous bottom whitespace. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: '온도 기준'. Headline COMPACT: '수면 환경 온도는' navy, '20~22°C' teal #2C6E63 underline. Large thermometer illustration center, minimal line art teal/coral. Below: single large info card light gray #F0F4F8 rounded, GENEROUS padding. Card content top-aligned: small gray label 'AAP 권장', large bold '20~22°C' teal, subtitle navy '(68~72°F)'. Below card: coral warning box rounded: '⚠️ 과열은 SIDS 위험 증가' coral #C44536 text. Comfortable spacing between elements. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: '체온 확인'. Headline COMPACT: '손발이 아닌' navy, '목 뒤·가슴 확인' teal underline. Center: illustration of baby torso with hand checking neck/chest area, minimal line art coral/navy. Below: two stacked cards light gray #F0F4F8, REDUCED text 20% smaller, GENEROUS padding. Card 1: '✓ 정확한 위치' navy bold + 'ㆍ목 뒤 ㆍ가슴' navy. Card 2: '⚠️ 과열 증상' coral bold + 'ㆍ땀 ㆍ가슴 열감 ㆍ피부 홍조' navy. Comfortable card spacing. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: '옷차림'. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: '안전 도구'. Generous spacing + thin horizontal divider navy. 소아과언니 navy bold large center (NO quotes). DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small. common_style:
# 클린 인포그래픽 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 텍스트: deep navy #1A1F36
- 강조: teal #2C6E63
- 경고: coral #C44536
- 카드 배경: light gray #F0F4F8
- VERY GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 20% 작게 (빽빽함 방지)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' Pretendard SemiBold navy only, no decoration, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
Large breathing whitespace before headline.
Headline COMPACT two lines: '[첫 줄]' navy, '[둘째 줄]' with '[핵심 단어]' underlined in teal #2C6E63.
Small subtitle gray: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE minimalist [토픽 관련] line illustration in teal, prominently placed.
Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

## BODY 데이터 카드 패턴
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-left small gray label: '[섹션명]'.
Headline COMPACT: '[앞부분]' navy, '[핵심 단어]' teal or coral underline.
Stacked/grid cards with REDUCED text (20% smaller) + GENEROUS padding + comfortable spacing.
Each card: age/category icon top-left + tag label + bold number/text + subtitle.
No pixel values as text on card.

## 비교 카드 패턴
Two side-by-side cards equal width.
Left card teal header / Right card navy header.
Body light gray: label small gray + main value teal/navy large bold + interval/unit navy.
Bottom coral warning box: ⚠️ + warning text.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' navy, '저장하세요' teal underline.
Source box light gray #F0F4F8 rounded GENEROUS padding, left-aligned.
출처 (navy small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
· [출처 3]
Generous spacing + thin horizontal divider.
소아과언니 navy bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] teal.
No pixel values. No quotes.
